scope: One exact create-only governance Markdown artifact.

acceptance.evidence: Focused runtime tests prove RESULT_VALIDATED becomes OUTPUT_BOUND, ARTIFACT_CREATED, and ARTIFACT_VERIFIED.
Missing, altered, or mismatched authorization fails closed.
An existing target fails closed and existing content remains unchanged.
Any target other than governance/MARKETING_DOMAIN_FOUNDATION_V1.md or any artifact type other than GOVERNANCE_DOCUMENT_MARKDOWN fails closed.
A missing governance directory fails closed.
The runtime verifies file existence, resolved path, content hash, and replay references.
Replay persists mutation authorization, binding evidence, binding artifact, and verification result.
The marketing-domain CLI path reaches OUTPUT_BOUND, ARTIFACT_CREATED, ARTIFACT_VERIFIED, REVIEW_COMPLETED, and TERMINATED.

validation.full_repository_tests: 4092 passed, 7 unrelated browser-companion constraint tests failed

known_validation_gaps: The full repository suite retains seven failures in browser-companion JavaScript constraint tests unrelated to the AiGOL real output binding runtime.
